li.xpath: /Defs/*[apparel and equippedStatOffsets and contains(defName, "Warcasket") and apparel/bodyPartGroups/li="Torso" and not(contains(defName, "Shoulders")) and not(contains(defName, "Bodysuit")) and not(equippedStatOffsets/ToxicEnvironmentResistance)]

match.xpath: /Defs/*[apparel and equippedStatOffsets and contains(defName, "Warcasket") and apparel/bodyPartGroups/li="Torso" and not(contains(defName, "Shoulders")) and not(contains(defName, "Bodysuit")) and not(equippedStatOffsets/ToxicEnvironmentResistance)]/equippedStatOffsets

li.xpath: /Defs/*[apparel and equippedStatOffsets and (defName="Apparel_Vacsuit" or defName="Apparel_VacsuitChildren" or defName="VGE_Apparel_Vacsuit_Prestige" or defName="Apparel_EVAsuit") and not(equippedStatOffsets/ToxicEnvironmentResistance)]

match.xpath: /Defs/*[apparel and equippedStatOffsets and (defName="Apparel_Vacsuit" or defName="Apparel_VacsuitChildren" or defName="VGE_Apparel_Vacsuit_Prestige" or defName="Apparel_EVAsuit") and not(equippedStatOffsets/ToxicEnvironmentResistance)]/equippedStatOffsets

li.xpath: /Defs/*[apparel and equippedStatOffsets and (defName="Apparel_SealedUndersuit" or defName="Apparel_AstroSuit" or defName="Apparel_SecurityArmor" or defName="Apparel_OrbitalArmor") and not(equippedStatOffsets/ToxicEnvironmentResistance)]

match.xpath: /Defs/*[apparel and equippedStatOffsets and (defName="Apparel_SealedUndersuit" or defName="Apparel_AstroSuit" or defName="Apparel_SecurityArmor" or defName="Apparel_OrbitalArmor") and not(equippedStatOffsets/ToxicEnvironmentResistance)]/equippedStatOffsets

li.xpath: /Defs/*[apparel and equippedStatOffsets and (defName="Apparel_GasMask" or contains(defName, "GasMask") or defName="VAE_Headgear_HAZMATMask" or contains(defName, "WarcasketHelmet") or defName="Apparel_AstroMask") and not(equippedStatOffsets/ToxicEnvironmentResistance)]

match.xpath: /Defs/*[apparel and equippedStatOffsets and (defName="Apparel_GasMask" or contains(defName, "GasMask") or defName="VAE_Headgear_HAZMATMask" or contains(defName, "WarcasketHelmet") or defName="Apparel_AstroMask") and not(equippedStatOffsets/ToxicEnvironmentResistance)]/equippedStatOffsets

li.xpath: /Defs/*[apparel and equippedStatOffsets and (contains(defName, "PowerArmorHelmet") or contains(defName, "ArmorHelmetRecon") or contains(defName, "ArmorHelmetCataphract") or contains(defName, "ArmorMarineHelmet") or contains(defName, "ArmorHelmetMech") or contains(defName, "AbsolverHelmet") or contains(defName, "DeserterHelmet") or contains(defName, "JanissaryHelmet")) and not(equippedStatOffsets/ToxicEnvironmentResistance)]

match.xpath: /Defs/*[apparel and equippedStatOffsets and (contains(defName, "PowerArmorHelmet") or contains(defName, "ArmorHelmetRecon") or contains(defName, "ArmorHelmetCataphract") or contains(defName, "ArmorMarineHelmet") or contains(defName, "ArmorHelmetMech") or contains(defName, "AbsolverHelmet") or contains(defName, "DeserterHelmet") or contains(defName, "JanissaryHelmet")) and not(equippedStatOffsets/ToxicEnvironmentResistance)]/equippedStatOffsets

li.xpath: /Defs/*[apparel and equippedStatOffsets and (contains(defName, "PowerArmor") or contains(defName, "ArmorRecon") or contains(defName, "ArmorMarine") or contains(defName, "ArmorCataphract") or contains(defName, "ArmorLocust") or contains(defName, "ArmorPhoenix") or contains(defName, "MechlordSuit") or contains(defName, "ArmorAbsolver") or contains(defName, "ArmorDeserter") or defName="VFEP_Apparel_Privateer") and not(contains(defName, "Helmet")) and not(equippedStatOffsets/ToxicEnvironmentResistance)]

match.xpath: /Defs/*[apparel and equippedStatOffsets and (contains(defName, "PowerArmor") or contains(defName, "ArmorRecon") or contains(defName, "ArmorMarine") or contains(defName, "ArmorCataphract") or contains(defName, "ArmorLocust") or contains(defName, "ArmorPhoenix") or contains(defName, "MechlordSuit") or contains(defName, "ArmorAbsolver") or contains(defName, "ArmorDeserter") or defName="VFEP_Apparel_Privateer") and not(contains(defName, "Helmet")) and not(equippedStatOffsets/ToxicEnvironmentResistance)]/equippedStatOffsets

li.xpath: /Defs/*[apparel and equippedStatOffsets and (contains(defName, "PlagueMask") or contains(label, "plague mask")) and not(equippedStatOffsets/ToxicEnvironmentResistance)]

match.xpath: /Defs/*[apparel and equippedStatOffsets and (contains(defName, "PlagueMask") or contains(label, "plague mask")) and not(equippedStatOffsets/ToxicEnvironmentResistance)]/equippedStatOffsets

li.xpath: /Defs/*[apparel and equippedStatOffsets and (defName="Apparel_ClothMask" or contains(defName, "SurgicalMask") or contains(label, "surgical mask") or contains(label, "face mask")) and not(equippedStatOffsets/ToxicEnvironmentResistance)]

match.xpath: /Defs/*[apparel and equippedStatOffsets and (defName="Apparel_ClothMask" or contains(defName, "SurgicalMask") or contains(label, "surgical mask") or contains(label, "face mask")) and not(equippedStatOffsets/ToxicEnvironmentResistance)]/equippedStatOffsets

li.xpath: /Defs/*[apparel and equippedStatOffsets and (contains(defName, "Suit") or contains(label, "suit") or contains(defName, "Armor") or contains(defName, "Armour") or contains(label, "armor") or contains(label, "armour") or contains(defName, "Cuirass") or contains(label, "cuirass") or contains(defName, "Flak") or contains(label, "flak") or contains(defName, "WarcasketShoulders") or contains(label, "warcasket shoulders")) and not(contains(defName, "Helmet")) and not(contains(label, "helmet")) and not(equippedStatOffsets/ToxicEnvironmentResistance)]

match.xpath: /Defs/*[apparel and equippedStatOffsets and (contains(defName, "Suit") or contains(label, "suit") or contains(defName, "Armor") or contains(defName, "Armour") or contains(label, "armor") or contains(label, "armour") or contains(defName, "Cuirass") or contains(label, "cuirass") or contains(defName, "Flak") or contains(label, "flak") or contains(defName, "WarcasketShoulders") or contains(label, "warcasket shoulders")) and not(contains(defName, "Helmet")) and not(contains(label, "helmet")) and not(equippedStatOffsets/ToxicEnvironmentResistance)]/equippedStatOffsets

li.xpath: /Defs/*[apparel and equippedStatOffsets and (contains(defName, "Mask") or contains(label, "mask")) and not(equippedStatOffsets/ToxicEnvironmentResistance)]

match.xpath: /Defs/*[apparel and equippedStatOffsets and (contains(defName, "Mask") or contains(label, "mask")) and not(equippedStatOffsets/ToxicEnvironmentResistance)]/equippedStatOffsets

li.xpath: /Defs/*[apparel and equippedStatOffsets and (contains(defName, "Helmet") or contains(label, "helmet")) and not(equippedStatOffsets/ToxicEnvironmentResistance)]

match.xpath: /Defs/*[apparel and equippedStatOffsets and (contains(defName, "Helmet") or contains(label, "helmet")) and not(equippedStatOffsets/ToxicEnvironmentResistance)]/equippedStatOffsets
